data.name: Cheyanne

weaponImprint.name: Night-Wayfaring Cardamom
weaponImprint.trait: After attacking an enemy target with defense less than or equal to 0, deal 1 point of fixed stability damage.
weaponImprint.effect: For each round, the first two attacks have their Physical damage increased by 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%/40% and ignore 10%/14%/18%/22%/26%/30% of the target's defense.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Mokosh units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A tactical figure that is hidden and cautious in words and actions. She has a reserved personality, is not good at expressing itself, and is easily shy. Although it may not be related to her current functions, she still pursues unremitting enthusiasm to explore unknown areas and dabble in various skills. This enthusiasm was buried deep beneath her unperturbed appearance by the introverted her, like a pearl in the dust, and only the commander with unique wisdom discovered her unique brilliance. “...I just understand a little bit, no need to praise me...I'm just an ordinary tactical Doll.”

skills.name: Playing to Potential
skills.description: Select one target within the entire map and deal Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Meticulous Planning
skills.description:
When an enemy within the entire map completes its turn, Cheyanne triggers [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] to it. If the target has a [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] of 50% or greater, then the damage multiplier is increased to 180%.

Applies 100% [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] to all enemy units.

Increase damage dealt to flying units by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
When an enemy within the entire map completes its turn, Cheyanne triggers [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] to it. If the target has a [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] of 50% or greater, then the damage multiplier is increased to 180%.

Applies 100% [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] to all enemy units. When dealing damage, for every 10% of the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c], critical damage is increased by 5%.

Increase damage dealt to flying units by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
When an enemy within the entire map completes its turn, Cheyanne triggers [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] to it. If the target has a [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] of 50% or greater, then the damage multiplier is increased to 220%.

Applies 100% [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] to all enemy units. When dealing damage, for every 10% of the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c], critical damage is increased by 5%.

When [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] deals damage, gain 1 stack of [effect:935252d6-9d74-4f35-8a55-42edf31e8e6e] which can trigger at most once per turn.

Increase damage dealt to flying units by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
When dealing damage, for every 10% of the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c], critical damage is increased by 5%.

The effects of [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] is enhanced, ignore target Stability Index is increased to 10 points and 5 points respectively.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The damage multiplier of [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] is increased to 160%.

If dealing damage to a target with [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] of 50% or higher, the damage multiplier is increased to 220%.

When [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] deals damage, gain 1 stack of [effect:935252d6-9d74-4f35-8a55-42edf31e8e6e] which can trigger at most once per turn.

skills.name: Wall of One's Self
skills.description: Gains [effect:1c52541a-c6f4-4ee3-8eba-42226acc96e1]. Gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] after using the skill. When receiving fatal damage with [effect:1c52541a-c6f4-4ee3-8eba-42226acc96e1], the buff holder will not die, instead deploying [effect:1ec58298-1452-4048-b00e-68b74e719e11] tiles within a 1 tile radius around the buff holder, lasting 1 turn. This effect can trigger at most once per battle; Cheyanne will not die while within the [effect:1ec58298-1452-4048-b00e-68b74e719e11] tile.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Gains [effect:1c52541a-c6f4-4ee3-8eba-42226acc96e1]. Gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] after using the skill. When receiving fatal damage with [effect:1c52541a-c6f4-4ee3-8eba-42226acc96e1], the buff holder will not die, instead deploying [effect:1ec58298-1452-4048-b00e-68b74e719e11] tiles within a 2 tile radius around the buff holder, lasting 2 turns. This effect can trigger at most once per battle; Cheyanne will not die while within the [effect:1ec58298-1452-4048-b00e-68b74e719e11] tile.

For each turn with [effect:1c52541a-c6f4-4ee3-8eba-42226acc96e1] active, gain 1 stack of [effect:71bb1ac2-abda-4053-b8c1-9a67fb40dca2] at the end of each round.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
For each turn with [effect:1c52541a-c6f4-4ee3-8eba-42226acc96e1] active, gain 1 stack of [effect:71bb1ac2-abda-4053-b8c1-9a67fb40dca2] at the end of each round.

The duration of [effect:1ec58298-1452-4048-b00e-68b74e719e11] tiles are increased to 2 turns, and their range is increased by 1 tile.

Cooldown of this skill is reduced by 2 turns.

skills.name: Steadfast Pursuit
skills.description: Select 1 target within the entire map and applies [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb] to the target and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb] effect is enhanced: Defense reduction is increased to 100%; when attacked by Cheyanne, no longer consumes [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c].

skills.name: Piercing the Heavens Into the Sun
skills.description:
Select 1 target within the entire map, reset the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] and deals Physical damage equal to 200% of attack.

If the target has [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb], then the critical damage is increased by 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select 1 target within the entire map, reset the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] and deals Physical damage equal to 280% of attack.

If the target has [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb], then the critical damage is increased by 30% and 50% of their defense is ignored.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Select 1 target within the entire map, reset the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] and deals Physical damage equal to 330% of attack.

When dealing damage, if there are 3 or less enemy on the field with [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] less than 50%, the damage multiplier is increased to 380%.

If the target has [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb], then the critical damage is increased by 30% and 50% of their defense is ignored.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier increased to 280%. If the target has [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb], 50% of their defense is ignored.
vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.vertebraeName: Piercing the Heavens Into the Sun Lv.2

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Damage multiplier increased to 330%. When dealing damage, if there are 3 or less enemy on the field with [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] less than 50%, the damage multiplier is increased to 380%.
vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.vertebraeName: Piercing the Heavens Into the Sun Lv.3

keys.effect: Damage dealt to targets with higher current HP than self is increased by 10%.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - Love is a Long-Awaited Reunion

keys.effect: When dealing targeted damage, knocks the target back by 2 tiles and applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 2 turns.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 1 - Don't Approach Me, I'm Shy

keys.effect: Immune to [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] debuffs. Every 3 turns, grants immunity to AoE damage once.
At the start of battle, increase mobility by 2 tiles for 1 turn. Create a vantage-point platform at the nearest empty tile around Cheyanne.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 3 - A Small Step of Courage

keys.effect: When an enemy with [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb] dies, apply [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb] to the enemy unit with the highest current HP on the field
Damage dealt to targets marked by [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb] is increased by 10% and this damage is considered Heavy Ammo.

In every round, when an enemy marked by [effect:f2c128cd-652e-4fca-a084-778ab1a5cfcb] ends their turn, Cheyanne's skill [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] will be used on them once. Its damage to the target and Stability damage is multiplied based on the number of [effect:75b53edd-502e-4e09-bba0-49c2d73840ca] that have been applied during this turn. Restore 2 points of Confectance Index. This can trigger at most once per round.

vertebrae.effect:
When dealing damage, for every 10% of the target's [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c], critical damage is increased by 5%.

The effects of [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c] is enhanced, ignore target Stability Index is increased to 10 points and 5 points respectively.

doll.name: Cheyanne
doll.effects: A tactical figure that is hidden and cautious in words and actions. She has a reserved personality, is not good at expressing itself, and is easily shy. Although it may not be related to her current functions, she still pursues unremitting enthusiasm to explore unknown areas and dabble in various skills. This enthusiasm was buried deep beneath her unperturbed appearance by the introverted her, like a pearl in the dust, and only the commander with unique wisdom discovered her unique brilliance. “...I just understand a little bit, no need to praise me...I'm just an ordinary tactical Doll.”

imagoforms.effect: If not moved this turn, damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy target in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt against enemy units that are more than 5 tiles away is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

When Cheyanne attacks, if the target's Analytical Value is greater than or equal to 50%, critical damage is increased by 30% and 6 points of Stability Index are ignored.

If the Analytical Value is less than 50%, critical damage is increased by 10% and 3 points of Stability Index are ignored.

After Cheyenne deals damage to an enemy unit, 30% of the target's Analytical Value is consumed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"29168fdb-3cbb-4a64-9124-bdc3b2d0af57","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

When Cheyanne attacks, if the target's Analytical Value is greater than or equal to 50%, critical damage is increased by 30% and 10 points of Stability Index are ignored.

If the Analytical Value is less than 50%, critical damage is increased by 10% and 5 points of Stability Index are ignored.

After Cheyenne deals damage to an enemy unit, 30% of the target's Analytical Value is consumed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

When attacked by Cheyanne, defense is decreased by 50%. Only one of this effect can exist on the field. Considered a Defense debuff and cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"ebc3d513-aef1-4198-8365-6271dc3cba25","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

When attacked by Cheyanne, defense is decreased by 100% and no longer consumes [effect:309ba122-5fe7-4d5e-bcc0-da725a066d9c]. Only one of this effect can exist on the field. Considered a Defense debuff and cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
For each stack of this effect, the damage multiplier of Piercing the Heavens Into the Sun is increased by 80%. Stacks up to 3 times. This effect cannot be cleansed.
Attack is increased by 20%, stacking up to 3 times. This effect cannot be cleansed.

Increase attack by 50% and critical rate by 20%. Defense is fixed to 0 and maximum HP is fixed at 30% of initial max HP.

Cannot be displaced by enemy units. When an ally is present, cannot be targeted by enemy's basic attacks or active skills.

This buff is removed by when Cheyenne moves. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.
When Cheyanne is on this tile, she will not die.
